# Product Analytic Sale

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! source digest: sha256:be6a9d790d6f759f96208b8c0dfb1cf3c965308b5eb92babafea5d923619a3ae

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

This module allows to compute the analytic distribution on sale order line level
from the one stored either on product category either on product level
(see product_analytic module).

## Developers

This module is a glue module between the modules **product_analytic** and **sale**.

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

Bugs are tracked on [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/OCA/account-analytic/issues).

[feedback](https://github.com/OCA/account-analytic/issues/new?body=module:%20product_analytic_sale%0Aversion:%2016.0%0A%0A**Steps%20to%20reproduce**%0A-%20...%0A%0A**Current%20behavior**%0A%0A**Expected%20behavior**).

methods.name: odoo.addons.product_analytic_sale.models.sale_order_line.SaleOrderLine._compute_analytic_distribution
documentation:
Get analytic distribution from product expense analytic account
If no account is set, call super with those records

methods.name: odoo.addons.product_analytic_sale.tests.test_analytic_sale.TestSaleAnalytic.test_create_invoice_after
documentation:
Create a sale order with no distribution on product 1
Then, set a distribution
Create the invoice and check the invoice line has the analytic

methods.name: odoo.addons.product_analytic_sale.tests.test_analytic_sale.TestSaleAnalytic.test_create_invoice_distribution_plan
